name: CKEditor

values.name: ckeditor
values.comment:
Render a CKEditor instance

    view model =
        ckeditor
            [ config defaultConfig
            , content model.content
            , onCKEditorChange CKEditorChanged
            ]
            []
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: config
values.comment:
Config property of the CKEditor web component. Upon changing the config,
the CKEditor instance is reloaded to apply the changes.

    config <|
        Json.Encode.object
            [ ( "uiColor", JsonEncode.string "#AADC6E" ) ]

Available options are documented at
<http://docs.ckeditor.com/#!/api/CKEDITOR.config>

values.name: content
values.comment:
Content property of the CKEditor web component. This is an HTML string. content "

Hello CKEditor!

\n"

values.name: defaultConfig
values.comment: Default CKEditor config, this is just an empty JSON object value

values.name: onCKEditorChange
values.comment:
Event fired when the CKEditor content changed. This event will not
necessarily fire on every single input action.

    type Msg
        = CKEditorChanged String

    onCKEditorChange CKEditorChanged
